# 📖 ZK Tale 2: Three Trials 🌔
**act** · swordsman · narrative · zero_knowledge

The Three Trials of Truth. Blade 49 (110001), Moon Phase 🌔, V(π,t) terms: [C, P]. Vertex ⟨1,0,0,0,1,1⟩. Setup, CRS, Adaptive Security.
> *The foundation laid in public view creates no vulnerability if built with many hands — trust distributed becomes trust earned.*
